'''dharuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidom|cnidom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidom|cnidom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dharuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæririth|dhæririth]] || [[word:dhæririj|dhæririj]] || [[word:dhærirish|dhærirish]] || [[word:dhæriri|dhæriri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dharururuth|dharururuth]] || [[word:dharururuj|dharururuj]] || [[word:dharururush|dharururush]] || [[word:dharururu|dharururu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dharuruth|dharuruth]] || [[word:dharuruj|dharuruj]] || [[word:dharurush|dharurush]] || [[word:dharuru|dharuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dharufruth|dharufruth]] || [[word:dharufruj|dharufruj]] || [[word:dharufrush|dharufrush]] || [[word:dharufruf|dharufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dharuruthu|dharuruthu]] || [[word:dharuruju|dharuruju]] || [[word:dharurushu|dharurushu]] || [[word:dharuruku|dharuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dharuruth|dharuruth]] || [[word:dharuruj|dharuruj]] || [[word:dharurush|dharurush]] || [[word:dharuru|dharuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dharuruthul|dharuruthul]] || [[word:dharurujul|dharurujul]] || [[word:dharurushul|dharurushul]] || [[word:dharurukul|dharurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dharuruthuthu|dharuruthuthu]] || [[word:dharurujuju|dharurujuju]] || [[word:dharurushushu|dharurushushu]] || [[word:dharuruku|dharuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dharuruthun|dharuruthun]] || [[word:dharurujun|dharurujun]] || [[word:dharurushun|dharurushun]] || [[word:dharurukun|dharurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dharuruthuoro|dharuruthuoro]] || [[word:dharurujuoro|dharurujuoro]] || [[word:dharurushuoro|dharurushuoro]] || [[word:dharurukuoro|dharurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
